local_updates: Thunder lost Game 6 and the Western Conference Finals are tied 3–3.
Thunder vs Spurs Game 7 is scheduled for May 30 at Paycom.
Game 7 stacks directly with the Route 66 Centennial Celebration downtown.
Women's College World Series continues at Devon Park with visitors, families, hotels and restaurants active across the metro.
Mooney’s Pub and Brickhouse Saloon both have Friday/Saturday live music and nightlife activity.
With OU summer slowdown underway, evening movement shifts more toward downtown OKC, casino traffic, concerts and nightlife venues.
weather_watch: Late May warm weather with possible scattered storms affecting outdoor events, WCWS timing and downtown movement.
